title: belladonna pudica
intro: Belladonna pudica, also known as the lady's nightcap, is a species of flowering plant in the nightshade family that is native to Australia. The plant contains tropane alkaloids, which are known for their medicinal properties, including analgesic, antispasmodic, and sedative effects. The health benefits of belladonna pudica include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and muscle spasms, as well as pain relief. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it should be used with caution due to its potential toxicity and side effects.
